steps.title: Identify the explicit contrast
steps.content: The passage states realism was “a rejection of the romantic style” and shows what romantics did “instead.” Since realism means accurate portrayal, the word “instead” signals that romantics took the opposite approach to depicting their subjects.

steps.title: Find the word for exaggeration
steps.content:
Exaggerate is correct: romantic painters overstated and magnified their subjects' beauty and heroism while hiding imperfections—the opposite of realist accuracy.

The other three either minimize those qualities (mock, undermine) or don't fit the artistic context (correct).

That matches choice B — B is correct.
